text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Don't be shy! Does a photograph with the great
T.M. Opera O tickle your fancy?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I can emulate a graceful angel descending from
the heavens—a water spirit jovially playing with
mermaids...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No matter the role you give me, I shall embody it!
For a limited time only!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well? Don't rush me all at once! Those who wish
to partake, form a line!
